description.p: Mini EQ lets you adjust the sound from your desktop before it reaches your speakers or headphones.
Use ten compact bands to shape bass, mids, and treble, save presets for different outputs, compare the processed sound with the original, and monitor levels while you listen.
Import Equalizer APO and AutoEq presets when you want to start from an existing correction for your headphones or speakers.

screenshot.caption: Adjust sound output with equalizer controls
Use the equalizer with dark style

ul.li: Add live LUFS loudness metering in the monitor strip.
Use the existing audio monitor stream for listening-session loudness readings.
Bundle loudness metering support in Flatpak builds.
Add per-output preset links for automatically using different saved presets with different outputs.
Protect unsaved curve edits when an output changes instead of replacing them with an automatic preset.
Show output preset link status in the GNOME Shell extension.
Improve Flathub presentation metadata, screenshots, and app icon assets.
Add a second dark-style screenshot while keeping the default light screenshot first.
Refine graph, analyzer, fader, and utility-pane spacing for the public screenshot.
Add System, Light, and Dark appearance modes.
Improve light-theme readability across the graph, analyzer, faders, and signal controls.
Refresh the public screenshot and social preview assets.
Improve compact window sizing so the minimum layout uses available vertical space.
Add release preflight guidance for GNOME Shell extension upload decisions.
Refresh the public screenshot and social preview assets.
Improve analyzer rendering responsiveness with a dedicated spectrum widget.
Improve GNOME Shell extension controls and review packaging checks.
Clarify Equalizer APO and AutoEq preset import guidance.
Add a companion GNOME Shell extension for panel controls.
Add the Mini EQ D-Bus control API used by the shell extension.
Refresh the public screenshot and social preview assets.
Redesign the signal inspector with compact headroom, preamp, and monitor controls.
Replace the large peak warning with inline headroom status and a quick safe-preamp action.
Add a local symbolic monitor settings icon and refresh public screenshots.
Refine the main workspace layout, graph sizing, and compact editor behavior.
Improve Flatpak packaging metadata and update install guidance for the Flathub release.
Refresh the public screenshot and social preview assets.

description.p: Fix package metadata for PyPI publishing.
